title: The Underground Trade Port: Aftermath
description: Pages 21–22 focus on the underground trade port: aftermath, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as franky, the Tontatta, and the Straw Hats push into the hidden factory network beneath Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I wonder if they can hear any of this up above.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey, who did that!!? Who dropped that cargo!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's trapped underneath. His body's been crushed

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'll keep working....!! Just let me see my family...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Fool. Those who can't meet their Quotas...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...go straight to the scrapheap! Take him away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: W...Wait... I can still work!! Stop it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey, Robin! Just now, I heard...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: If you're gonna get greedy, then the deal's off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Just because you've got jokes back- ing you...

summary: The Underground Trade Port: Aftermath focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as franky, the Tontatta, and the Straw Hats push into the hidden factory network beneath Dressrosa.
